description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a dark matte finish, likely intended for urban combat scenarios. The body is constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a robust upper receiver and an integrated optic system mounted on top. The stock is fixed and ergonomic, providing stability and comfort for the user, while the pistol grip and trigger guard are designed for secure handling. The barrel is short and heavy, optimized for maneuverability in close quarters, and the rifle includes a detachable box magazine for rapid reloading. A rail system is present beneath the barrel, allowing for the attachment of accessories such as grips or lights. The overall appearance is modern and functional, with angular lines and reinforced components for durability.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a fixed stock, integrated optic, and short heavy barrel, finished in dark matte colors. Features include a detachable box magazine and accessory rail for urban combat use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, integrated optic, and accessory rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel, and the alignment of the optic system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine well, trigger area, and additional details of the receiver and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear of the optic, and the back of the receiver.
